raw_consumer_statement: I made a return to XXXX XXXX in XXXX NY. I didn't receive a refund or proof of refund from the business so I filed a dispute with Citibank. Citibank showed a refund in my account from the business and I received a receipt from the business for the refund, so I cancelled the dispute. I then learned that it wasn't actually a refund, it was a conditional credit from Citibank that was then taken back from me when I withdrew the dispute. Citibank says there is nothing they can do because once you close a dispute they can't reopen it. The business says there is nothing they can do because they issued the refund to Citibank. I have no idea what to do.
